rationale: Section 26.03 governs tax increment financing exclusions from tax rate calculations and expressly does not apply to school districts. The proposed homestead exemption increase under §11.13(b) is a school district exemption, so §26.03 is unaffected.
quote: (b) This section does not apply to a school district.
_note: No conflict; §26.03(b) excludes school districts from its scope, and §11.13(b) homestead exemption applies to school districts.
